markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on refactoring the CVE database project.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Code Freeze:** A code freeze is active to prevent rework during SentinelOne's refactor of the CVE database.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [**Algolia Migration:** SentinelOne will migrate the database to Algolia to fix performance issues (e.g., slow search) caused by fetching all entries on every page load.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Ownership Handoff:** SentinelOne will own the refactor, then hand the project back to GrowthX for ongoing maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Bug Fixes:** SentinelOne will fix P0/P1 bugs during the refactor; GrowthX will handle lower-priority fixes post-handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Performance & Scalability

  - [The current architecture fetches all entries from the CMS on every page load, causing performance issues.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [**Symptom:** Slow search, even with only 500 entries.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Prevents scaling the database to the planned 10,000+ entries.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Solution: Refactor & Migrate to Algolia

  - [SentinelOne will refactor the project to use Algolia as the index for all posts.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Algolia will handle search/filtering, simplifying the codebase and improving performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [The refactor will also align the project with SentinelOne's new site architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [**Updates:** Package versions, Next.js best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [**Migration:** From Next.js PageRouter to AppRouter (scheduled for December).](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Execution & Handoff

  - [**Code Freeze:** Active immediately to prevent rework.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Refactor Ownership:** SentinelOne's Andrew VanNess (Dev Lead) will lead the refactor.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Bug Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**SentinelOne:** Will fix P0/P1 bugs during the refactor.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Will handle lower-priority (P2/P3) fixes post-handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Handoff:** SentinelOne will return the project to GrowthX for ongoing maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Communication:** Andrew will maintain a regular sync cadence to keep GrowthX informed.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Content Publishing Coordination

  - [**GrowthX:** Will inform the content team about the refactor to coordinate the publishing of new entry batches.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:** Requested a temporary pause on new content publishing until the refactor is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Inform the content team about the refactor to coordinate the publishing schedule for new entry batches.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:**](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Begin the CVE database refactor, including the Algolia migration.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [Fix any P0/P1 bugs identified during the refactor.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Schedule a regular sync cadence with GrowthX to provide updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ksLxDPjFGyJWzvQxa8qg4g2WgezBZerK?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
